series_metadata.series_title: File of Licensed Resiratory Care Provide
series_metadata.series_description: Contains all originall applications for license or permit, supporting documentation, copy of license certificate, address and phone number. File also contains Board Correspondence to and from respiratory care providers. Also, copies of adjudication order and opportunity for hearing notices

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 60 years, or until notification of death of licensee, which ever occurs first, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 60 years, or until notification of death of licensee, whichever occurs first, then destroy. Convert to new readable format if software requirements change, Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
